executive_summary: Fifth consecutive week with zero productive trades. The bot is completely paralyzed — 0 trades across 7 days in both trending_up and trending_down regimes. The Supply & Demand Zone strategy with min_score 75 is filtering out 100% of signals. This is no longer a parameter tuning problem; it is a fundamental architecture failure requiring immediate structural overhaul.
target_progress: 0% — completely stalled, 70% target is unreachable with current architecture
regime_assessment: Regime detection appears to be working (correctly identifying trending_up then trending_down), but it provides zero value because no strategy adapts to it. The bot uses the same Supply & Demand Zone strategy regardless of regime, generating no trades in either direction.

symbol_changes.remove_reason: No symbol data available — zero trades means no evidence to act on
symbol_changes.focus_reason: Cannot determine focus symbols without trade data. Need to first solve the zero-trade problem.

dow_pattern: No day-of-week pattern discernible — zero trades across all days for multiple weeks. Day filtering is irrelevant until trade generation is restored.

param_search_adjustments.reasoning: min_score of 75 has produced 0 trades for 2 consecutive weeks. Aggressive reduction to 45-65 range is needed to generate ANY signals. RR ratio lowered to 1.2-2.0 to widen the acceptable trade envelope — a 2.0+ RR in trending markets rarely presents clean zone entries.

structural_recommendations.change: Add regime-adaptive strategy selection: use trend-following (breakout/momentum) in trending regimes instead of mean-reversion Supply & Demand Zones. S&D zones should only activate in ranging/consolidating regimes.
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Restore trade generation from 0 to 3-5 trades/week minimum. Trending regimes occupied 100% of recent weeks — a trend strategy would have had entries.

structural_recommendations.change: Implement a 'minimum activity threshold' circuit breaker: if zero trades are generated for 2 consecutive days, automatically reduce min_score by 10 points (floor at 40) until at least 1 trade triggers.
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Prevents indefinite paralysis. Guarantees at least 1-2 trades per week for continuous learning and P&L generation.

structural_recommendations.change: Add short-side capability: allow selling supply zones in trending_down regimes instead of only buying demand zones. The bot has been trying to buy in 4+ weeks of downtrend.
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Doubles the opportunity set. Previous W23 review identified this exact problem — demand zones breaking down in downtrends. Short entries at supply zones align with regime direction.

structural_recommendations.change: Replace single-strategy architecture with a strategy ensemble: maintain 2-3 strategies (S&D Zones for range, Momentum for trend, VWAP reversion for intraday) and allocate capital based on regime classification.
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Eliminates regime-strategy mismatch that has caused 5 weeks of failure. Expected to produce 5-10 trades/week with 50%+ diversification benefit.

structural_recommendations.change: Add a paper-trade shadow mode: generate and log signals that WOULD have triggered at min_score 50, 60, 70 without executing. Use this data to calibrate optimal min_score with actual market outcomes.
structural_recommendations.expected_impact: Provides data for evidence-based parameter optimization instead of blind adjustments. Would have identified optimal threshold weeks ago.

primary_strategy_next_week: Momentum/Breakout (trending regime) with Supply & Demand Zones as secondary (only if range develops)
